meaning: vt.浣垮彈绁炵粡鏀厤,淇冧娇(鍣ㄥ畼,鑲岃倝绛夌殑)娲诲姩
examples: Some parasympathetic fibers innervate the ventricular blood vessels.
This innervate the adjacent region of the fore and middle intestine.
Conclusion: the sympathetic nerves on the vertebral artery innervate in segments and on the same side.
It's also possible, doctors say, for the donor heart to re-innervate -- or grow nerves onto the donor heart.
